title: Corpus File Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for corpus files in domain-v4/knowledge/corpus/. Enables discoverability through structured metadata including title, summary, topics, and cluster assignment.

title.description: Human-readable title for the corpus file. Should clearly indicate the subject matter.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence summary of the file's contents. Used for TOC display and search result previews.

topics.description: Searchable topic keywords. Use lowercase with hyphens for multi-word topics. Minimum 3 topics for discoverability.

cluster.description: Logical grouping for browsing. Cluster assignment enables mode=cluster queries in consult_corpus.

cluster_descriptions.description: Reference descriptions for each cluster (not enforced, for documentation)

narrative-structure.const: Plot organization, pacing, branching, nonlinear storytelling, endings

prose-and-language.const: Voice, dialogue, exposition, subtext, prose techniques

audience-and-access.const: Age targeting, accessibility, localization, inclusive design

world-and-setting.const: Worldbuilding, setting as character, environmental storytelling

emotional-design.const: Emotional beats, conflict patterns, resonant moments

scope-and-planning.const: Project sizing, metrics, balancing scope and quality
